title: lellingeria subsessilis
intro: Lellingeria subsessilis, also known as the Rattlesnake Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been known to aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The health benefits of Lellingeria subsessilis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant in tincture form.
